columns.extraction_plan: The median on-treatment duration for the treatment arm (SOC + AAP) is reported in the "RESULTS" section. Extract the value "29 months" from the text: "Median time on abiraterone in the SOC + AAP group was 29 months (IQR 12-71)..."

The text states that "All patients received lifelong ADT" (androgen deprivation therapy) in the control arm. While ADT is the treatment for the control arm, a specific median duration in months for this "lifelong" therapy is not reported in the document.
